todos: Film 2-3 new 'Looksmax coach' demo variants (new person's scan, new typed questions) — main winner is fatiguing: 0 conv on $240 Jul 2, ~$155 CPA last 3 days
Watch ABO test ad (launched 6/29) for 48h; graduate to main CBO if CPA holds under $40 (7d CPA $35.32, $15.80 today)
Investigate Jul 1 organic install spike (458 installs vs ~200 norm) and try to replicate the source
If main creative logs another 0-conversion day, cut CBO budget 30-50% until refresh creatives are live

actions.title: Main winner fatiguing: $619 spend, 4 conv last 3 days (~$155 CPA)
actions.detail: Ad 2026-04-29: 0 conv on $239.78 Jul 2, 1 conv on $139.68 Jul 3. Watch time slid 3.94s to 2.41s. 7d CPA $49.21 vs ~$32 norm. Refresh or cut budget.

actions.title: ABO test at $35.32 CPA, $15.80 today — graduation candidate
actions.detail: Test ad (6/29): 3 conv on $47.41 today after 2 zero days. 7d: $105.95, 3 conv. Watch 1.95s is weak; verify 48h more before moving to CBO.

actions.title: 93% of 7d spend on one creative
actions.detail: Main ad took $1,574.58 of $1,685 total (7d). Over the 70% concentration threshold and pipeline has only 1 active test.

actions.title: Jul 1 organic spike: 458 installs vs ~200 norm
actions.detail: Spend was flat (~$240), so spike is organic. 7d: 1,703 installs, 91.6% onboarding completion, blended CAC ~$0.99.

formats: Coach demo variant: type 'Am I cooked or is there hope' into AI coach, show new person's scan, scores, routine
